ogTitle: West Lakes Shore vs West Richmond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Lakes Shore and West Richmond.
heading: West Lakes Shore vs West Richmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Lakes Shore, South Australia and West Richmond, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Lakes Shore has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to West Richmond (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Lakes Shore or West Richmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Lakes Shore has a flood risk score of 60/100, while West Richmond scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Lakes Shore scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. West Richmond scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Lakes Shore or West Richmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Lakes Shore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
